title: arachniodes pseudorepens
intro: Arachniodes pseudorepens, also known as the creeping fern or autumn fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in East Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arachniodes pseudorepens are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea or added to infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
